text: A beach with lots of people and umbrellas.
A couple cuddles on a bench a distance from a tree.
People fly a variety of kites in a city park.
A woman is holding a box of doughnuts next to a man in glasses and a hat.
Several clocks sitting on a table with scales.
A couple of birds flapping their wings in a tree.
An adult and young child standing at a wire enclosure looking at a giraffe.
Colorful chairs are situated in front of a large library collection.
Two big brown bears are wrestling in their swimming pool.
A man riding on the back of a motorcycle in front of a crowd.
